title: ephedra distachya subsp. helvetica
intro: Ephedra distachya subsp. helvetica is a subspecies of the Ephedra distachya plant, which belongs to the Ephedraceae family and is native to Europe. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, containing ephedrine, a naturally occurring compound that acts as a stimulant and decongestant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. The health benefits of Ephedra distachya subsp. helvetica include its ability to improve circulation, boost energy, and aid in weight loss, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations. The plant is often used in herbal supplements and teas, where it can be consumed in the form of capsules, tablets, or infusions to reap its medicinal benefits.
